One Of the most attractive feat
Gres of the mineral department of
the Spokane Interstate fair, October
3 to 9 next. will be the exhibit now
being prepared by the department
of mining and metallurgy of the
University of Idaho at Moscow. G.
NJ Edgett of Moscow, who is In
Spokane today, SAYS that no pains
are being spared by Prof Richard
S, McCaffery of the chair of mining
and metallurgy to make the exhibit
in every way thoroughly representa-
tive of the great mining industry Of
Idaho. The mining demonstrations
feature of the exhibit will be highly
educational and will illustrate the
inner workings Of mine in a way
that will he a revelation to the unin-
itiated.


Included in the exhibit will be
set" Of mine timbers used by the
Hercules Mining Co. to illustrate
pOirt in contention in a recent law.
suit. Another interesting feature OF
the exhibit will be miniature
stamp mill complete, that carried
off the bronge medal at the Pan
American exposition.
